tracks.meaning: to be able to do something or have the power or skill to accomplish it
a cylindrical metal container used for holding or preserving liquids, powders, or other materials
to preserve food in a sealed tin or metal container by heating
used to express doubt or disbelief about what someone has said
a cylindrical data storage device used in early computing systems
a container or vessel used in medical contexts for holding sterile instruments or substances
a cylindrical buoyant object used to mark navigation channels or moorings
an armored combat vehicle with tracks and a rotating turret armed with weapons
a large cylindrical storage container for grain or other agricultural products
